intro.title: Your safe space
intro.subtitle: At {{siteName}} we cultivate freedom. Our community operates under Colombian law:

items.title: Law 30/1986
items.description: Up to 20 plants for personal use

items.title: Legislative Act 02/2009
items.description: Constitutional basis: possession and use of substances in personal doses shall not be punishable, prioritizing treatment over punishment

items.title: Ruling C-491/2012
items.description: Supply dose: protects anyone carrying more than 20g if they prove it is for their own projected consumption over time

items.title: Law 1787/2016
items.description: Medical and Scientific Framework: the use of cannabis for medicinal purposes is a right

items.title: Ruling C-127/2023
items.description: Responsible Use: protects public consumption as part of the free development of personality

items.title: Ruling SU-226/2024
items.description: Associative clubs: shared consumption in private settings is not micro-trafficking if there is no commercial profit motive

items.title: Protected delivery
items.description: Our deliveries comply with personal dose limits (20g marijuana / 5g hashish) established by Law 30/1986, ensuring each member receives only what is legally permitted

items.title: Coexistence Restrictions
items.description: The right to consume has clear limits: it must not take place in parks or within the perimeter of educational centers (schools or kindergartens) to protect minors

items.title: Not a purchase
items.description: By making my contribution, I acquire Virtual Coins that I use as a voluntary contribution to the club's common fund. This contribution allows the club to send me benefits as a member of the collective cultivation.

items.title: Care mandate
items.description: I delegate to the club the administration and care of my plants permitted by Law 30/1986.

items.title: Personal Use
items.description: I declare that this withdrawal is for my exclusive consumption, protected by Ruling C-221/94 (Free development of personality).

items.title: Supply
items.description: The volume withdrawn corresponds to my supply dose for future consumption (Ruling C-491/12).

items.title: Responsibility
items.description: I commit not to commercialize or distribute what I receive, assuming full responsibility for its final destination.
